name: JoAi: Create Reminder

description.en: Schedule a reminder so your AI agent notifies you at the right time. Whether it's a meeting, a follow-up, or a personal errand, your agent will send you a timely notification so nothing slips through the cracks.
description.de: Plane eine Erinnerung, damit dein KI-Agent dich zur richtigen Zeit benachrichtigt. Egal ob Meeting, Follow-up oder persönliche Erledigung — dein Agent schickt dir rechtzeitig eine Benachrichtigung, damit nichts untergeht.
description.es: Schedule a reminder so your AI agent notifies you at the right time. Whether it's a meeting, a follow-up, or a personal errand, your agent will send you a timely notification so nothing slips through the cracks.
description.fr: Schedule a reminder so your AI agent notifies you at the right time. Whether it's a meeting, a follow-up, or a personal errand, your agent will send you a timely notification so nothing slips through the cracks.
description.ro: Schedule a reminder so your AI agent notifies you at the right time. Whether it's a meeting, a follow-up, or a personal errand, your agent will send you a timely notification so nothing slips through the cracks.
description.it: Schedule a reminder so your AI agent notifies you at the right time. Whether it's a meeting, a follow-up, or a personal errand, your agent will send you a timely notification so nothing slips through the cracks.

bot: Use this when the user wants to be reminded of something at a specific time. Extract the reminder text and when they want to be reminded.

inputs.bot: The reminder text — what should the user be reminded about.

inputs.name: Scheduled At
inputs.bot: ISO datetime for when to trigger the reminder (e.g., 2025-03-01T09:00:00Z). If the user says 'tomorrow', compute the actual date.
